description: Levene's test for homogeneity of variance across groups in a CSV (+ box/variance figure).
rules: read-only — input CSV is never mutated
groups the value column by the group column and runs Levene's test
reports the variance ratio (max/min) alongside the test
JSON report + PNG figure written to record_store
usage: Set DATA_CSV, VALUE_COL, GROUP_COL, and optionally ALPHA (default 0.05). Output: homogeneity.json + homogeneity.png.
limitation: Needs at least two groups, each with >= 2 observations. Requires numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib present; degrades to an empty report otherwise.
